name: typewhisper
title: TypeWhisper
description: Voice dictation, transcription history, and profile management for TypeWhisper
author: SeoFood

preferences.name: port
preferences.title: API Port Override
preferences.description: Leave empty for auto-discovery. Only set if using a custom port.

commands.name: search-history
commands.title: Search History
commands.description: Search and browse TypeWhisper transcription history

commands.name: show-last-transcription
commands.title: Show Last Transcription
commands.description: Copy the most recent transcription to clipboard

commands.name: transcribe-file
commands.title: Transcribe File
commands.description: Transcribe an audio file using TypeWhisper
